evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: focus on detail, precision and working transparently; master understanding of the data and underlying financial processes
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Classified as rigour because responsibilities emphasise 'detail, precision', mastering financial processes, and streamlining reporting — with no velocity or speed-to-ship signals anywhere.
evidence.domain_risk: analytical insights on various financial KPIs for the Product & Technology management department; worldwide Henkel financial community
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Classified as high because the role produces financial KPI reporting for a large multinational's management department — errors directly affect financial decision-making at enterprise scale.
evidence.collaboration_width: worldwide Henkel financial community; worldwide Henkel technical community
evidence.data_team_maturity: worldwide Henkel financial and technical community; established Power BI/DAX stack; formal financial reporting processes
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Classified as mature because Henkel is a large global multinational with established financial reporting infrastructure, specialised tool stack (Power BI/DAX/Power Query), and a worldwide financial and technical community.
evidence.jd_authorship: Provide overviews and analytical insights on various financial KPIs for the Product & Technology management department; development of advanced analytical tools in Power BI
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Classified as mixed because 'financial KPIs for the Product & Technology management department' and 'Power BI, DAX, Power Query M' are specific, while 'streamline reporting activities' and 'manage your projects' are generic.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: analytical insights on various financial KPIs for the Product & Technology management department; worldwide Henkel financial community
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Classified as finance because the primary output is financial KPI reporting for management, with 'finance & business understanding' explicitly named as a candidate requirement.
evidence.autonomy_level: Play a key role in development; Provide overviews and analytical insights; Manage your projects
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Classified as execution because 'play a key role', 'provide overviews', and 'manage your projects' signal the candidate delivers against defined financial reporting needs rather than setting strategy or direction.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool usage or AI infrastructure enablement is mentioned anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Classified as absent because no testing tools, data contracts, observability, or data quality practices are mentioned anywhere in the posting.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: focus on detail, precision; master understanding of the data and underlying financial processes; financial KPIs
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Classified as moderate because 'detail, precision' and 'master understanding of financial processes' signal concern about financial reporting accuracy, but there is no compliance, audit, or trust-failure language in responsibilities.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: streamline reporting activities; development of advanced analytical tools
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Classified as fix_scale because the role extends and streamlines existing financial reporting processes and Power BI tooling within an established multinational infrastructure.
evidence.loss_aversion: focus on detail, precision and working transparently; financial KPIs — accuracy in financial reporting is the concern, but no audit or compliance language is present in responsibilities.
evidence.work_arrangement: hybrid work model and up to 30 days per year for remote work abroad
